steps.t: Parchments posted by the Withered Tree and despairing citizens who read their messages can be found throughout the First and Second Circles of the cit…
Echadon is in the Second Circle of the city. You have sought to raise the spirits of people in the lower Circles of the city.
Echadon is concerned about the morale of a group of his men on the north end of the Second Circle of the city. A feeling of hopelessness has begun to …
Celonor looks especially worried and downcast.
Celonor and other men of the garrison are at the north end of the Second Circle, and need tales of courage to inspire them.
Celonor and other men of the garrison are at the north end of the Second Circle, and need tales of courage to inspire them.
Echadon is at the south end of the Second Circle of the city. You have raised the spirits of Celonor and the other men of the garrison.
